questions.question: According to Paul, what must a person do to be saved?
options: Be circumcised and follow the Law
Confess Jesus as Lord and believe God raised him from the dead
questions.answer: Confess Jesus as Lord and believe God raised him from the dead

questions.question: Paul says faith comes from what?
Paul says there is a difference between Jew and Greek when it comes to calling on the Lord.
How beautiful are the _____ of those who bring good news!
For whoever will call on the name of the Lord will be _____.
